name: Smoked Chicken Endive and Walnut Dressing (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound haricots verts, ends snapped and strung
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin and fat from the chicken and cut into bite-sized strips or chunks. Place in a mixing bowl.
2. Cut endives into half-inch cross sections.
3. Boil or steam haricots verts for 4 to 5 minutes, or until just tender. Drain and refresh under cold water; pat dry. Cut them on bias into two-inch lengths.
4. In a small mixing bowl, combine rice vinegar, dijon mustard, vegetable oil, and walnut oil. Adjust flavors and season with salt and pepper.
5. Toss the dressing with chicken, endives, and green beans.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper and garnish with scallions and crumbled blue or goat's cheese (optional).
7. Serve with cornbread.
Yield: 2 servings
